the diagram models the process of user registration and creation of a new user.
the main flows represent the sequence of events from starting the process to creating a new user.
the conditions/branches are based on the user's registration status and the creation of a new user.
there are no loops or repetitions in the process.

the diagram models a user navigating through a menu to reach a specific page.
the user can select different menu items to access various pages.
the user can also choose to close the menu and open a schema.
the diagram does not show any error paths or edge cases.

the diagram models a sequence of actions performed by the user and the system.
the main flow represents the correct sequence of events.
the condition "i primi 4 campi sono stati compilati correttamente?" is a decision point that branches to either "compilare i primi 4 campi correttamente" or the end of the sequence.

the diagram models the process of viewing all alerts and getting one alert.
the user can view all alerts and select one to get it.
the system returns one alert to the user.
the user can view one alert repeatedly.

the diagram models the process of creating a profile, which involves clicking on the profile in the lateral menu, clicking on the blue icon of the house, passing to the abitazioni screen, and then saving or discarding the changes.
the flow is a sequence of actions that lead to a decision point where the user is asked if the fields are correctly filled in.
if the fields are correct, the user can save the changes or discard them; if not, they are asked to correct the data.
